claims.claim: Using a synthetic categorical-distribution simulator across 40 random seeds and 24 generational cycles, we compare four scenarios: unfiltered recursive synthetic replacement, expert quarantine alone, real-data anchoring alone, and the full immune system (anchor plus experts).
